name: Graduate Student
history: Recurrent dreams during graduate school about being unprepared for a thesis defense. Father described as having high expectations.
intermediate_belief: If I don't meet expectations, I will fail.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't handle criticism; it means I am failing.
coping_strategies: Over-preparing for tasks to avoid criticism.
situation: Receiving criticism during a work performance review.
auto_thought: I am not good enough; I will never meet expectations.
behavior: Becomes defensive or overly apologetic during reviews.
